case_title: RITA LARK et al VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LARK, RITA ( GUARDIAN ) LARK-ISAAC, HATTIE (MINOR) ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-12-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY RICHARD ROMASANTA--INTERN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM . APPLICATION IS GRANTED - JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL -
